feature: cron-subagent approval gate reads ContextVar not raw env
why: Cron subagents must inherit approval gating from session ContextVars instead of ambient process environment.

Supervisor-specific restart exit contracts prevent restart loops and preserve launchd's intentional nonzero restart path. NOT converged: upstream (2026-07 40dbfa0e3) exits 75 unconditionally and relies on RestartForceExitStatus=75 in the unit file; the fork branches systemd→0 / launchd→75 instead. Checked 2026-07-16 retirement audit: keep the fork branch.

feature: hygiene compaction announces in-chat on success
why: Successful hygiene compaction must be visible in the originating chat without exposing misleading raw message counts.
The fork intentionally exposes agent-callable messaging and MoA toolsets that upstream does not ship.

feature: telegram polling never drops pending updates on recovery
why: Recovery paths must keep Telegram pending updates; only cold bootstrap may drop stale backlog. CONVERGED in adapter code (2026-07-16 audit: zero fork delta on the drop_pending path) — the fork's contribution is now only the guard-test file, kept as a regression tripwire against upstream refactors reintroducing queue drops.

feature: cron scheduler per-job reasoning and script timeout helpers
why: Cron jobs intentionally support per-job reasoning overrides and a bounded script-timeout resolution chain; the extracted fork helper must keep both behaviors byte-identical.

feature: relay-pool session affinity and lane headers
why: Claude API proxy pool requests must keep per-session affinity and classify interactive versus background relay lanes without stamping third-party providers.

feature: gateway restart failure count entry codec
why: Restart-loop failure counts must continue decoding legacy scalar entries and structured replay-breaker state byte-identically after extraction.

feature: gateway configured and persisted route identity helpers
why: Gateway session routing must preserve credential-free configured identity parsing and fail-closed persisted route lookup semantics after extraction.

feature: tool-search unwrap scope gate and delegate code_execution inheritance exemption
why: Tool-search bridge calls must be scoped to the session's granted deferrable tools, and inherited subagent toolsets must keep the fork's code_execution exemption while stripping blocked delegation surfaces.

feature: state pure fork helpers preserve denorm gate and platform session search
why: Fork-owned pure state helpers must keep the config-only session-list denorm gate and cross-platform session title search aliases byte-identical while reducing inline fork logic in hermes_state.py.
